text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of anticipation—a preparation for dialogue and discovery. The glass meeting room, brightly lit and neatly arranged, evokes a silent pause before an intellectual gathering. The adjacent R+D display, full of text and interactive screens, whispers of perpetual inquiry and creative exploration. I feel enveloped by the possibility of ideas colliding and evolving; it makes me aware of the infinite dance between thought, technology, and society. There's a quiet excitement—a readiness to both witness and contribute to the forge of understanding.
